productDisplayName: Fila Men's Union Beige Royal Shoe
description: Get ready to hang out in style and comfort in these Maverick Lowsfrom fila. This is a fresh take on the classic tennis shoe design.Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Double mock uppers with textile lining for maximum comfort and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Brand logo on the side of heel in stylized design Brand logo appliquéd on the tongue Gum rubber toe guard for protection Midsole Lightly cushioned footbed for all day comfort EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Outsole Gum rubber outsole with diagonal multi-directional grooves for greater grip and traction Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine was
